title: Monachosorum × flagellare
taxonomy: Monachosorum × flagellare is a hybrid species of the genus Monachosorum, which belongs to the family Ophioglossaceae. This plant is a type of fern and is commonly found in tropical regions. Monachosorum × flagellare is a natural hybrid between Monachosorum filiforme and Monachosorum serratum. The classification of Monachosorum × flagellare is further supported by its morphological characteristics, which are intermediate between its parent species. Further study is needed to confirm the classification of Monachosorum × flagellare.
